scripts.dev: bun run wasm:build && bun run --parallel dev:vite dev:wasm dev:server
scripts.dev:wasm: cargo watch -w game/src -w client-wasm/src -s "wasm-pack build client-wasm --target web --out-dir pkg --dev"
scripts.setup: cargo install wasm-pack && cargo install cargo-watch
scripts.docs:data: node scripts/update-map-index.mjs && node scripts/extract-map-data.mjs && node scripts/generate-sitemap.mjs
scripts.docs:dev: bun run docs:data && cd docs-site && cargo leptos watch
scripts.docs:build: bun run docs:data && cd docs-site && cargo leptos build --release
